2603.17296.title: GUIDE: GenAI Units In Digital Design Education
2603.17296.paper_summary: GenAI Units In Digital Design Education (GUIDE) is an open courseware repository with runnable Google Colab labs and other materials. We describe the repository's architecture and educational approach based on standardized teaching units comprising slides, short videos, runnable labs, and related papers. This organization enables consistency for both the students' learning experience and the reuse and grading by instructors. We demonstrate GUIDE in practice with three representative units: VeriThoughts for reasoning and formal-verification-backed RTL generation, enhanced LLM-aided testbench generation, and LLMPirate for IP Piracy. We also provide details for four example course instances (GUIDE4ChipDesign, Build your ASIC, GUIDE4HardwareSecurity, and Hardware Design) that assemble GUIDE units into full semester offerings, learning outcomes, and capstone projects, all based on proven materials. For example, the GUIDE4HardwareSecurity course includes a project on LLM-aided hardware Trojan insertion that has been successfully deployed in the classroom and in Cybersecurity Games and Conference (CSAW), a student competition and academic conference for cybersecurity. We also organized an NYU Cognichip Hackathon, engaging students across 24 international teams in AI-assisted RTL design workflows. The GUIDE repository is open for contributions and available at: https://github.com/FCHXWH823/LLM4ChipDesign.
2603.17296.paper_summary_zh: GenAI單元在數位設計教育中的應用（GUIDE）是一個開放的課程資源庫，包含可運行的Google Colab實驗室和其他材料。<lb/>我們描述了該資源庫的架構和基於標準化教學單元的教育方法，這些單元包括幻燈片、短視頻、可運行的實驗室和相關論文。<lb/>這種組織方式為學生的學習體驗以及教師的重用和評分提供了一致性。<lb/>我們通過三個代表性單元展示了GUIDE的實踐：VeriThoughts用於推理和基於形式驗證的RTL生成、增強的LLM輔助測試平台生成，以及LLMPirate用於IP盜版。<lb/>我們還提供了四個示例課程實例的詳細信息（GUIDE4ChipDesign、建造您的ASIC、GUIDE4HardwareSecurity和硬體設計），這些實例將GUIDE單元組合成完整的學期課程、學習成果和畢業專案，所有這些都是基於經過驗證的材料。<lb/>例如，GUIDE4HardwareSecurity課程包括一個關於LLM輔助硬體木馬插入的專案，該專案已成功在課堂上以及在網絡安全遊戲和會議（CSAW）中部署，這是一個針對網絡安全的學生競賽和學術會議。<lb/>我們還組織了一個NYU Cognichip黑客馬拉松，讓來自24個國際團隊的學生參與AI輔助的RTL設計工作流程。<lb/>GUIDE資源庫對貢獻者開放，並可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/FCHXWH823/LLM4ChipDesign。
2603.17296.author: Weihua Xiao et.al.
2603.17296.authors: Weihua Xiao, Jason Blocklove, Matthew DeLorenzo, Johann Knechtel, Ozgur Sinanoglu, Kanad Basu, Jeyavijayan Rajendran, Siddharth Garg, Ramesh Karri
